svg.title: High Level Design — RAG Document Intelligence Platform
svg.desc: System overview showing the ingestion pipeline feeding Qdrant, and the LangGraph Adaptive RAG query pipeline with LangSmith observability and AWS deployment layers.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the document loader step in the ingestion pipeline')
sendPrompt('Explain the chunker step in the ingestion pipeline')
sendPrompt('Explain the embedder step — dense and sparse')
sendPrompt('Why did we choose Qdrant over ChromaDB?')
sendPrompt('What does the query router node do in LangGraph?')
sendPrompt('How does Qdrant hybrid search work with BM42 and RRF?')
sendPrompt('When does the web search fallback node trigger?')
sendPrompt('What is document grading in the CRAG pattern?')
sendPrompt('When does the query rewrite node trigger and how?')
sendPrompt('How does the Jina reranker work for cross-encoder re-ranking?')
sendPrompt('What is the generate node doing with Groq LLaMA-3?')
sendPrompt('What does LangSmith trace in LangGraph?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the FastAPI endpoints for ingest and query')
sendPrompt('What does the Streamlit UI show to the user?')
sendPrompt('How does Docker Compose wire Qdrant, backend, and frontend together?')
sendPrompt('How does the GitHub Actions CI pipeline work?')
sendPrompt('How does AWS EC2 pull and run the Docker image from ECR?')
